question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockFileTransformer.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: transform()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a BlockFile where hasRecordFile() returns true to bypass the full transformation pipeline in transform(), causing the embedded RecordFile to be passed directly to streamFileNotifier.verified() without re-verifying token transfer lists, leading to incorrect fund balances being persisted?
